name: Sindh (Pakistan)

colors.symbolism: Islam — drawn from the Pakistani national flag
peace and the central coat of arms
elements of the provincial coat of arms
elements of the provincial coat of arms
the Indus River and the Arabian Sea coast of the province

description: A green field charged centrally with the coat of arms of Sindh.
history: Sindh, in southeastern Pakistan, is one of the country's four provinces and is centred on the lower Indus River. The provincial flag bears the provincial coat of arms on a green field drawn from the Pakistani national flag.
